case_title: JEFFREY BAYER VS. TALENT INTERNATIONAL CA. INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-17-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-17-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JEFFREY BAYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TALENT INTERNATIONAL CA, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY TIM SHAW, DIRECTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED MAY-30-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TALENT INTERNATIONAL CA.  INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TALENT INTERNATIONAL CA.  INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,160.00 FILED BY BAYER, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT TALENT INTERNATIONAL CA.  INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT TALENT INTERNATIONAL CA.  INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-17-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAYER, JEFFREY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TALENT INTERNATIONAL CA.  INC. DEFENDANT'S OFFER OF EMPLOYMENT TO PLAINTIFF WAS AS AN "AT WILL" EMPLOYEE WHOSE EMPLOYMENT COULD BE TERMINATED AT ANY TIME WITH OR WITHOUT CASE. PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYMENT WAS TERMINATED WITH CAUSE BECAUSE THE UNDERLYING THIRD PARTY AGREEMENT THAT WAS THE BASIS OF DEFENDANT'S EMPLOYMENT OFFER WAS WITHDRAWN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
